channel.name: The Operator Economy
channel.positioning: AI businesses for people done with the broken job market
channel.audience: Senior professionals in career transition; builders who want income outside employment
channel.tone: Clean, high-end, minimal. Documentary rigor, operator credibility. Respectful, not hype. Never promise income — show sourced numbers.

format.note: Thesis-led episodes: 'this is the kind of business you can build' — not company deep-dives. Companies are evidence inside the thesis, spanning the LOW END (solo/side version) to the HIGH END (venture-scale version).

sections.purpose: The thesis in one line + the range: what the low-end solo version realistically makes vs what the high-end company built. <=15s.
The kind of business this is, who it serves, why AI makes it buildable by one person now, and what 'built' looks like at different effort levels.
Low end AND high end, with sourced numbers: a solo/small operator actually doing this (best-case case study) and the venture-scale version proving the market. Mini-breakdowns, not full company docs.
The exact tool stack: what each tool does, cost, alternatives.
Step-by-step build plan: week 1, month 1, first customer/dollar.
The honest output: realistic ranges by effort level, what it diversifies (income, skills, optionality), costs, failure modes.
Blueprint download + subscribe. One sentence each.

models.note: claude-sonnet-4-20250514 retired (404, 2026-07). Alias strings track latest.

voiceover.model_note: v3 (or flash_v2) required — pronunciation dictionaries are silently ignored on multilingual_v2. PVC voice needs Creator plan.
voiceover.voice_note: Manav's PVC (l5hGVGHeQhGPUn4tPtCD) on ELEVEN_MULTILINGUAL_V2 — switched 2026-07-05 ('woah this is it'): v2 supports request stitching (one continuous session across sections, kills the drift that v3 couldn't avoid), and the performed text's paragraph/ellipsis pacing carries cadence without v3's audio tags (auto-stripped on v2). Settings per Manav's screenshot: stability 0.5, similarity 0.6, style 0.1. Host name: MP (spoken 'Em Pee'). Mastering: CLEAN chain pending the LANDR-curve fit (Warm/Low preferred in his A/B).

pronunciation_dictionary.note: 'OE terms v1' — kept attached but eleven_v3 IGNORES dictionary locators (verified on pilot 2026-07-03). speech_aliases below is the enforcement layer.

speech_aliases._note: Spoken phonetic replaces the term in TTS text; captions show the display form. Manav = 'Mah-nuhv' — WON the 2026-07-04 acoustic bake-off (6 spellings TTS'd, MFCC-DTW ranked against his reference recording; 1.91 vs 2.09+). _note keys ignored.

performance.note: Think-aloud performance pass (loose-E register, locked 2026-07-03): Claude rewrites each section's vo_text into performed speech — pivots, restatements, paragraph breathing, [exhales]/[inhales]/[short pause] tags, ellipses — under hard no-new-claims rules. Density: seasoned (hook/thesis/cta) vs light (evidence/stack/playbook/economics). Performed text cached at vo/performed-<id>.txt for gate review. Tags stripped from captions. Mastering softened same day (pharma-ad fix) + room tone under everything.

layout.note: Bridge after the series line: 2.5 bars (2026-07-05, 'shorter, not too much shorter'). Music FADES OUT into it, scratches hit at its start, dead air on the title card, beat enters with the $5.9B slam.

consistency_guard.note: Disabled on v2 — request stitching solves consistency structurally. Re-enable if ever back on v3.

bookends.cut_note: 2026-07-05: bookend TitleCard removed — the intro visuals now live in content screens (brand reset until 'This week', then the Operator Blueprint title card until 'Last year'). Brand sting 1.8s stays; content starts right after it.
outro_ctas: Get the Operator Blueprint — free, link in the description
One business blueprint every week — subscribe
bookends.note: Brand sting kept short on purpose: pre-hook branding costs retention. Outro holds 6s for YouTube end-screen overlays.

compliance.notes: Human POV pass required at Gate 1. Never publish an unedited AI script (YouTube inauthentic content policy, Jan 2026 AI disclosure rules).

autonomy.training_note: training_mode=True forces pre-publish escalation (episode library review) regardless of score. Flip to False after ~4-6 weeks once confidence scores correlate with operator judgments.

research.sources: Cowork agent (synthesis + nuance) + Exa (semantic discovery of non-obvious sources) + Perplexity Sonar (cited verification queries)
research.nuance_requirement: Every brief MUST include >=2 non-consensus angles: what common coverage gets wrong, counterintuitive data, or an operator-level insight absent from listicles. A brief that is common knowledge with citations fails.
research.claim_registry: Every load-bearing claim carries source URL + confidence marker (verified/reported/estimate).

music.note: v7 (2026-07-05): arrange_bed plays MANAV'S SCORE, decoded from his EP001 arrangement (bar-by-bar spectral classification). Grammar: intro chords → rise thru hook+bridge → groove @ thesis+2 bars → breakdown into evidence → body → bassline payoff → sting/roll pivot → chords REPRISE @ stack → playbook groove → honest-math breakdown+bass → ender → finale crests @ cta → closing. Continuous music; SoundBed ducks/silences on top. Kit = his hand-cut bar-exact loops (FLAC).
